cms.task_text: Nakreslete [hlp]tři soustředné šestiúhelníky[/hlp] o stranách 30, 55 a 80 px. Stejná výchozí pozice.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">55</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r3"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg3"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
